description: Sludge Blob improved combat behavior: ranged spit attack targeting random party member (not always the first), slow attack pattern (skip every other tick), and verify higher HP than rats
steps: In composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/combat/EnemyArchetype.kt, add an `attackStyle` property to the enum. SEWER_RAT gets MELEE (targets first living party member, attacks every tick), SLUDGE_BLOB gets RANGED_SLOW (targets random party member, attacks every 2nd tick), RAT_ACCOUNTANT keeps current behavior (handled by BossController). Add an enum AttackStyle { MELEE, RANGED_SLOW } in the same file or a new file.

In composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/combat/Combatant.kt, add a `ticksSinceLastAttack: Int` mutable counter (starts at 0) and an `attackStyle: AttackStyle` property (default MELEE). Update EnemyArchetype.spawn() to pass the appropriate attackStyle.

In composeApp/src/commonMain/kotlin/rpg/combat/CombatEngine.kt, modify the enemyTurn() method: for non-boss enemies, check their attackStyle. For MELEE: use existing behavior (strikeParty targeting first living). For RANGED_SLOW: increment ticksSinceLastAttack; if it's an even tick (0, 2, 4...) the blob attacks a random living party member, if odd tick it skips ('Sludge Blob is preparing to spit...'). Extract a new method strikeRandomPartyMember() that picks a random target from livingParty() using the engine's random instance.
Verify EnemyArchetype.SLUDGE_BLOB already has maxHp=20 (vs SEWER_RAT's 12) - it does, so no change needed.

Add new tests in composeApp/src/commonTest/kotlin/SludgeBlobCombatTest.kt: (1) Test that blob skips attack on odd ticks and attacks on even ticks. (2) Test that blob targets random party member (not always the first) - use seeded Random. (3) Test that blob has higher HP than rat (20 vs 12). (4) Test that SEWER_RAT still targets first living party member (regression).
acceptance_criteria: Sludge Blob attacks every 2nd tick (skip pattern) with a 'preparing' message on skip ticks
Sludge Blob targets a random living party member (not always the first)
Sludge Blob has 20 HP (higher than Sewer Rat's 12)
Sewer Rat behavior is unchanged (melee, targets first, attacks every tick)
Boss behavior is unchanged (handled by BossController, not affected by AttackStyle)
All existing tests pass plus new SludgeBlobCombatTest
No LLM/AI calls - combat remains fully deterministic with seeded Random
verification: Run ./gradlew desktopTest and confirm all tests pass including new SludgeBlobCombatTest
Run ./gradlew build to ensure compilation succeeds
findings: Full build fails due to missing ANDROID_HOME (no Android SDK in sandbox), but desktop compilation (compileKotlinDesktop) and all tests (desktopTest) pass. The RANGED_SLOW attack style uses ticksSinceLastAttack counter starting at 0, so the blob attacks on its first tick (even=0), prepares on tick 1, attacks on tick 2, etc. All 6 new tests pass alongside existing CombatEngineTest.
